query: SELECT m.id, m.scientific_name, mt.trade_name, mi.indication FROM medications m JOIN medication_trade_names mt ON mt.medication_id = m.id LEFT JOIN medication_indications mi ON mi.medication_id = m.id WHERE LOWER(mt.trade_name) LIKE '%mounjaro%' LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Lfvuvpa4KoYTbU.root --database a2JMvfTkjxD7rpSD5GgnMY --execute SELECT m.id, m.scientific_name, mt.trade_name, mi.indication FROM medications m JOIN medication_trade_names mt ON mt.medication_id = m.id LEFT JOIN medication_indications mi ON mi.medication_id = m.id WHERE LOWER(mt.trade_name) LIKE '%mounjaro%' LIMIT 20;
